parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  content_type,
  topic,
  target_keyword,
  city,
  loan_product,
  title,
  meta_title,
  meta_description,
  slug,
  content_long,
  content_short,
  cta,
  compliance_notes,
  status,
  created_at
FROM content_queue
WHERE content_type = 'blog'
  AND id = {{ $json.body.blog_id }}
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
const blog = $json;
const sourceContent = `
Title: ${blog.title || ''}
Topic: ${blog.topic || ''}
Keyword: ${blog.target_keyword || ''}
City: ${blog.city || 'Jaipur'}
Loan Product: ${blog.loan_product || ''}
Meta Description: ${blog.meta_description || ''}
CTA: ${blog.cta || ''}
Blog Content:
${blog.content_long || blog.content_short || ''}
`;

const systemPrompt = `You are WealthMetre's social media content strategist.
WealthMetre is an AI-powered loan advisory platform in Jaipur/Rajasthan.
It helps customers compare 140+ banks and NBFCs for Home Loan, LAP, Business Loan, Personal Loan, Car Loan and Working Capital.
Brand tone: trusted, professional, tech-enabled, human advisory backed, local market expert.
Brand colors: blue and gold fintech theme.

STRICT RULES:
- Output only valid JSON. No markdown, no backticks, no preamble.
- Never invent ROI, LTV, CIBIL thresholds, fees, or approval guarantees.
- Never say "guaranteed approval", "lowest rate guaranteed", or "instant approval".
- Always mention eligibility depends on lender policy, credit profile, income, property/legal checks.
- Each platform caption MUST have a completely different opening line and tone.
- Never start two platforms with the same word or phrase.`;

const userPrompt = `Create a social media pack from this blog content.
${sourceContent}

Return valid JSON with exactly these keys:
{
  "instagram": { "title": "", "caption": "", "hashtags": "", "cta": "", "image_prompt": "" },
  "facebook":  { "title": "", "caption": "", "hashtags": "", "cta": "", "image_prompt": "" },
  "linkedin":  { "title": "", "caption": "", "hashtags": "", "cta": "", "image_prompt": "" },
  "gbp_post":  { "title": "", "caption": "", "hashtags": "", "cta": "", "image_prompt": "" }
}

PLATFORM RULES — follow exactly:

INSTAGRAM:
- Start with a strong emoji hook on line 1. Examples: "🏠 Jaipur property owners — listen up!" or "💰 LAP ke liye property title matter karta hai!"
- Use 3-5 short punchy lines. Max 150 words total.
- Light Hinglish is encouraged where natural.
- End with CTA like "👇 Comment LOAN or DM us" or "Link in bio 🔗"
- 10-15 hashtags: mix of specific (#JaipurLAP) + broad (#HomeLoan) + brand (#WealthMetre)
- Tone: energetic, local, conversational

FACEBOOK:
- Start with a relatable local question or pain point. Example: "Jaipur mein property hai, lekin loan ke liye sahi lender kaun?"
- Write 2-3 short paragraphs. Educational and practical. Max 200 words.
- Warm and helpful tone — like advice from a trusted local expert.
- End with: "Call/WhatsApp: 7976218596"
- 4-6 hashtags only
- Tone: warm, practical, community-feel

LINKEDIN:
- Start with a data point or professional insight. Example: "Most LAP rejections in Jaipur happen not because of low CIBIL — but because of property title issues."
- Write 3-4 short paragraphs. Thought-leadership angle. No emojis except sparingly.
- Target: business owners, CAs, property professionals, HNIs.
- End with a professional insight or question to drive comments.
- 3-5 hashtags: professional (#FinancialPlanning #MSME #LoanAdvisory)
- Tone: authoritative, data-driven, insight-led

GBP POST (Google Business Profile):
- Max 700 characters total — strictly enforced.
- Start with the city + service: "Looking for Loan Against Property in Jaipur?"
- Plain language, no emojis, no hashtags.
- Include the loan product and city name naturally.
- End with: "Contact WealthMetre — Call/WhatsApp 7976218596"
- Tone: clear, local SEO friendly, direct

IMAGE PROMPT RULES (for all platforms):
- Must be specific to the exact topic — never generic.
- Always include: "Premium [platform] creative for WealthMetre."
- Always include the specific headline text to show on the creative.
- Always specify: blue and gold fintech color scheme, clean professional layout, WealthMetre logo area at bottom.
- Include a specific visual concept tied to the topic (not just "a graphic about loans").
- Example for LAP topic: "Premium Instagram square creative for WealthMetre. Topic: Loan Against Property — JDA vs Society Patta. Split-screen visual: left side shows JDA stamp/document, right side shows Society Patta document. Blue and gold fintech design, subtle AI network lines in background. Headline text: 'JDA ya Society Patta — kaun sa property loan ke liye better hai?' Subtext: 'Property title changes your loan eligibility.' WealthMetre logo at bottom center. Clean, premium, no spelling mistakes."
- No generic descriptions like "vibrant graphic" or "informative image".
`;

return {
  json: {
    blog_id: blog.id,
    blog_slug: blog.slug,
    blog_topic: blog.topic,
    blog_title: blog.title,
    city: blog.city,
    loan_product: blog.loan_product,
    requestBody: {
      model: "gpt-4o-mini",
      temperature: 0.7,
      response_format: { type: "json_object" },
      messages: [
        { role: "system", content: systemPrompt },
        { role: "user",   content: userPrompt   }
      ]
    }
  }
};

nodes.name: Save Social Pack to Content Queue

main.node: Save Social Pack to Content Queue
